title: tragacantha chilensis
intro: Tragacantha chilensis, also known as Chilean milk thistle or cardo chileno, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant's leaves, stems, and flowers have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha chilensis include its potential to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Tragacantha chilensis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments.
